title: A high-throughput DNA methylation analysis of a single cell.

content: S-EPMC3074158 PMC3074158 A high-throughput DNA methylation analysis of a single cell. In recent years, the field of epigenetics has grown dramatically and has become one of the most dynamic and fast-growing branches of molecular biology.
